title: Forecasting cluster saturation and producing a procurement timeline
query_text: Six-month CPU utilisation telemetry shows growth from 62% in October 2025 to 89% in March 2026. Forecast when the cluster will reach saturation and produce a procurement recommendation with timeline.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: At the current growth rate of ~4.5 percentage points per month, the cluster will reach 100% CPU utilisation in approximately 2.4 months (mid-June 2026). Hardware procurement lead time is typically 4-6 months. Recommendation: initiate procurement process immediately for at least 20% additional compute capacity; issue RFP within 2 weeks; target delivery by Q4 2026 to avoid saturation.
